name: Tajiri Resources Corp.
summary: Tajiri Resources Corp., an exploration stage company, acquires, evaluates, explores for, and develops mineral properties. It holds interests in gold projects covering Kaburi, Gargantuan, and Epeius located in Guyana; and Reo gold project covering an area of 1,002 square kilometers situated in Burkina Faso. The company is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
